sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Now I see the board has 6 green blocks remaining - 3 on top row and 3 on bottom row, all on the left side (cols 13-17, 19-23, 25-29). The right-side blocks are all cleared. Level not completed yet.
So clearing right-side blocks wasn't the goal either. I need to think more carefully.
Remaining: 6 green blocks on the left side. Purple blocks above 3 of the top ones.
Let me try clearing the remaining 6 blocks. But I know clicking bottom row cols 19-23 causes game_over. So I need to clear the other 5 first.
Top row: cols 13-17, 19-23, 25-29 (3 blocks)
Bottom row: cols 13-17, 25-29 (2 blocks, skipping 19-23 which causes game_over)
Let me clear these 5 and see what happens.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# 6 green blocks remain on left side. Clear the 5 safe ones (skip bottom row col 19-23)
action([
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 27, 'col': 15},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 27, 'col': 21},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 27, 'col': 27},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 33, 'col': 15},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 33, 'col': 27}
])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
